title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese outlines six skills for accelerating Claude-based projects: web scraping, knowledge base ingestion, system improvement, collaborative board features, focus groups, and compound engineering. The video demonstrates these practices through a fitness trainer project build and emphasizes methodical workflow.
